fragments.name: rooted-source-registry-surface
fragments.description: Declares the rooted source registry as the ingress identity surface for the metadata-first prose-to-structure lane.

fragments.name: structural-units-surface
fragments.description: Declares structural units as the first-class intermediate extraction layer between rooted sources and the semantic model.

fragments.name: canonical-semantic-model-surface
fragments.description: Declares the canonical semantic model as the authoritative middle for the metadata-first transform chain.

fragments.name: projection-binding-surface
fragments.description: Declares projection bindings as downstream contracts from the canonical semantic model to projected artifacts.

fragments.name: lane-dependency-order-surface
fragments.description: Declares the dependency order that keeps the metaschema model upstream of workflow docs and the scm.pattern operational carrier.

notes: Authoritative extension module for the metadata-first metaschema lane. It binds rooted ingress, intermediate extraction, canonical semantics, downstream projection bindings, and lane ordering without introducing admission or runtime orchestration.
